final:
// // This JK flip-flop toggles its output based on the inputs J and K and the clock signal. However, it does not include an asynchronous reset that sets the output to 0 when activated.
module jk_flip_flop(  
    input wire J,  
    input wire K,  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            Q <= 0;  
        end else begin  
            case ({J, K})  
                2'b00: Q <= Q;      // No change  
                2'b01: Q <= 0;      // Reset  
                2'b10: Q <= 1;      // Set  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;     // Toggle  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
